en: This requirement is triggered because you indicated your organization maintains a valid bizSAFE Level 3 in the Singapore bizSAFE Level 3 Applicability Assessment questionnaire.
Company bizSAFE certificates can be found through the [Workplace Safety and Health Council (WSHC) website.](https://survey.wshc.sg/Community/se/705E3EE811E215C7)
Please upload your bizSAFE Level 3 certificate.

The expiration date should be 3 years after the issue date. To check your expiration date, you may refer to the [bizSAFE e-services portal.](https://www.tal.sg/wshc/programmes/bizsafe/bizsafe-e-services)
Please enter the expiration date of your bizSAFE Level 3 certificate.
